channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: This swing has been problem for number of mo the, 21st March
item.description:
When Is this gunna get repaired instead of a chain at head height for the children to run into

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lawrence Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A number of abandoned vehicles, 21st March
item.description:
A number of vehicles abandoned. Parked bumper to bumper with parts handing off . Open bonnets with missing engines glam flat tyres and weeds growing around wheels they’ve been there over a year.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alma Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 100 Belsize Road, 21st March
item.description:
When vehicles pass over these areas—particularly at speed—they are forced to bounce, which is now consistently causing noticeable vibration and shaking inside my house. This is becoming increasingly disruptive and concerning, especially in terms of potential impact on the property over time. I would really appreciate an update on whether this issue can be inspected and scheduled for repair, as it does not seem to be improving and may worsen if left unaddressed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Belsize Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on the corner, 21st March
item.description:
Sign very helpful there's been less rubbish here lately But some dumped now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 288, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 21st March
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Stockwell Green, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Red Path E9, 21st March
item.description:
Left on the cycle path poses a danger to cyclist and children

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edmeston Close, Hackney, London

item.title: Antiques fair fly post, 21st March
item.description:
Attached to post on central island in road - tellow sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Parkhill Road, Bexley, Greater London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Two suitcses dumped, 21st March
item.description:
These two bags have been sat there for about a week now. One is a large suitcase and the other is one of those big market type bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camelot Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish near the sixth form entrance to trinity school and local residents, 21st March
item.description:
Silver Audi has dumped rubbish near the sixth form entrance to trinity school and local residents. Dangerous as it’s on a path leading to the park and it has recently been attracting vermin such as foxes which causes mess and further littering.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped by Trees, 21st March
item.description:
A large item of unwanted furniture has been left dumped by the trees on Badgemore Path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbours leaving rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
My neighbours are leaving rubbish in front of my house, The restaurants are leaving rubbish too. I am going to speak to all of them about this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Hinckley Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Mattress and Other Items Dumped on Pavement, 21st March
item.description:
A large unwanted mattress along with several other items have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass debris, 21st March
item.description:
Following an explosion at one of the flats on police cad 1670/21032026 the highway now requires cleaning of hazardous debris

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Square, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various Items of Rubbish Dumped on Turfed Area, 21st March
item.description:
Various items of rubbish have been left dumped on the turfed area by the edge of the pavement. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manthorp Road, Plumstead

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coupland Place, Plumstead

item.title: Broken and Unwanted Toy Dumped on Pavement, 21st March
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heavitree Road, Plumstead

item.title: Pile of Rubbish Dumped in Front of Garages, 21st March
item.description:
A pile of rubbish has been left dumped in front of the garages (the rubbish has been dumped on top of the large concrete block). Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heavitree Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Path, 21st March
item.description:
A large amount of unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heavitree Road, Plumstead
